dsl_rule.translation_notes: Context-dependent trend-following strategy using SMA crossover. Long position held when short-term (10-period) SMA exceeds long-term (50-period) SMA; short position held otherwise. Exits occur on crossover reversal. The allowed indicators include sma_10 and sma_50 which match the specified parameters exactly.

backtest_rule.reason: Context-dependent trend-following strategy using SMA crossover. Long position held when short-term (10-period) SMA exceeds long-term (50-period) SMA; short position held otherwise. Exits occur on crossover reversal. The allowed indicators include sma_10 and sma_50 which match the specified parameters exactly.

source_rule_text: A trader should hold a long position when short-term moving average exceeds long-term moving average, and hold a short position otherwise, using optimized lookback periods for both averages.
